playlist_strategy: A progressive escalation of high-BPM, aggressive, and bass-heavy tracks designed to push listeners through peak physical exertion, culminating in maximum energy anthems.

tracks.title: Adrenaline Surge
tracks.youtube_title: ADRENALINE SURGE ⚠️ Insane Pre-Workout Hype Music
tracks.listening_scenario: Pre-workout scoop kicking in, walking into the gym
tracks.style_prompt: Aggressive gym trap, heavy 808s, distorted brass hits, fast hi-hat patterns, hype energy, dark and gritty
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic shot of a muscular athlete tying their shoes in a dark, neon-red lit locker room, dripping sweat, intense focus, 8k resolution, photorealistic
tracks.youtube_description: Kickstart your session with Adrenaline Surge. Perfect for that pre-workout hype when you need to flip the switch. Drop a like if this gets you fired up! 🔥

tracks.title: Iron Crusher
tracks.youtube_title: IRON CRUSHER 💀 Ultimate Phonk Gym Motivation
tracks.listening_scenario: First heavy compound lift, crushing PRs
tracks.style_prompt: Drift phonk, aggressive cowbell melody, distorted memphis vocal samples, heavy sidechained bass, dark gym vibes
tracks.image_prompt: Close up of heavily chalked hands gripping a bending Olympic barbell loaded with massive plates, dynamic lighting, purple neon glow, raw power
tracks.youtube_description: We don't skip leg day. Iron Crusher is the ultimate drift phonk track for dominating your PRs. Subscribe for more demonic gym beats. 😤

tracks.title: Limitless Power
tracks.youtube_title: LIMITLESS POWER ⚡ Cyberpunk Midtempo Bass Workout
tracks.listening_scenario: Focused isolation exercises, maintaining the pump
tracks.style_prompt: Dark cyberpunk midtempo, heavy industrial bass, slow driving beat, futuristic synth layers, sci-fi workout energy
tracks.image_prompt: A cyborg athlete lifting futuristic glowing weights in a dark cyberpunk cityscape, neon cyan and magenta rim lighting, highly detailed
tracks.youtube_description: Lock in. Limitless Power provides that slow, driving industrial tempo perfect for hypertrophy and time-under-tension. 🦾

tracks.title: Beast Within
tracks.youtube_title: WAKE THE BEAST 👹 155BPM Hardstyle Gym Anthem
tracks.listening_scenario: Going to absolute failure on the hardest set
tracks.target_audience: Hardcore lifters, Zyzz legacy followers, ravers
tracks.style_prompt: Euphoric gym hardstyle, 155 BPM, massive supersaw chords, distorted hardkick, epic emotional breakdown, pure adrenaline drop
tracks.image_prompt: A monstrous silhouette of a bodybuilder roaring in triumph amidst a fiery gym background, sparks flying, blazing orange and yellow aesthetic, 4k
tracks.youtube_description: For the sets that actually matter. Wake the Beast Within with this euphoric hardstyle banger. We go to failure! 🔱

tracks.title: Unbreakable Focus
tracks.youtube_title: UNBREAKABLE FOCUS 🧠 Intense Synthwave for Training
tracks.listening_scenario: Long steady-state cardio or structured volume training
tracks.style_prompt: Dark synthwave, retro futuristic action movie soundtrack, driving analog bassline, punchy retro drums, relentless rhythm
tracks.image_prompt: A retro-futuristic grid landscape with a glowing red sun, a lone runner sprinting endlessly toward the horizon, 80s aesthetic, synthwave art
tracks.youtube_description: Get into the flow state. Unbreakable Focus is your darksynth companion for pushing through the pain barrier on those long sets. 🏃‍♂️

tracks.title: Blood Sweat Tears
tracks.youtube_title: BLOOD SWEAT TEARS 🩸 Heavy Metal x Trap Workout
tracks.listening_scenario: Deadlifts, raw power movement, anger channeling
tracks.style_prompt: Trap metal, heavy down-tuned guitar riffs mixed with fast trap high hats and distorted 808s, screaming intense energy, aggressive workout
tracks.image_prompt: A shattered mirror reflecting a furious athlete screaming through a heavy deadlift, blood red lighting mixed with cold harsh concrete grey
tracks.youtube_description: Channel your rage. Blood Sweat Tears is pure aggression in musical form. Hit that PR today. ⚔️

tracks.title: Final Rep
tracks.youtube_title: FINAL REP 🚀 174BPM Drum & Bass Cardio/Lifting Energy
tracks.listening_scenario: HIIT intervals, CrossFit wods, speed training
tracks.style_prompt: High energy drum and bass, neurofunk, fast complex drum breaks at 174 bpm, deep dark rolling basslines, high octane racing energy
tracks.image_prompt: A high speed blur of a sprinter on an indoor track, glowing acid green motion trails, high contrast dark background, dynamic angle
tracks.youtube_description: Need speed? Final Rep delivers 174 BPM of pure Drum & Bass adrenaline for your HIIT and cardio sessions. Keep moving! ⚡

tracks.title: Pulse Pounder
tracks.youtube_title: PULSE POUNDER 🔊 Bass House Gym Banger
tracks.listening_scenario: Circuit training, kettlebell swings, up-beat pump
tracks.target_audience: EDM fans, rhythmic lifters, calisthenics athletes
tracks.style_prompt: Heavy bass house, energetic 128 bpm EDM workout, bouncy wobbly bassline, punchy house drums, vocal chops, aggressive club energy
tracks.image_prompt: A glowing kettlebell mid-swing in a dark, underground warehouse gym illuminated by pulsing electric blue strobe lights
tracks.youtube_description: Keep the rhythm and keep the pump. Pulse Pounder is your daily dose of Bass House for the gym floor. 🕺🏋️

tracks.title: Titan Awakening
tracks.youtube_title: TITAN AWAKENING 🏛️ Epic Orchestral Workout Trap
tracks.listening_scenario: The ultimate PR attempt, conquering the impossible
tracks.target_audience: Anyone attempting a personal record, epic dreamers
tracks.style_prompt: Cinematic orchestral trap, Hans Zimmer meets heavy 808s, massive brass stabs, epic battle choir, emotional and incredibly powerful buildup
tracks.image_prompt: A colossal marble statue of a Greek god coming alive in a modern gym, glowing gold energy radiating from it, epic cinematic lighting
tracks.youtube_description: For the moments that echo in eternity. Titan Awakening is the ultimate track for your heaviest lift of the year. Become a legend. 👑

tracks.title: Apex Predator
tracks.listening_scenario: Leaving nothing left in the tank, absolute destruction
tracks.style_prompt: Violent tearout dubstep, heavy riddim, aggressive machine gun bass, extremely punchy snare, dark oppressive atmosphere, headbanger gym anthem
tracks.image_prompt: A pair of glowing toxic green eyes roaring from the shadows of a dark, steel-heavy dungeon gym, feral and aggressive vibe
tracks.youtube_description: Finish the workout by destroying everything in your path. Apex Predator is the heaviest dubstep track you will lift to today. Break your limits. ☢️
